title: dbg125 theme stability and pill button system
description:
Theme switching no longer flickers or snaps back — local choice wins until the server confirms, and changing theme no longer rebuilds the whole PipeSync page. The dark capsule pill button style (orange dot, underline, glow) is now consistent across PipeSync and PipeShare tabs, toolbars, modals, and menus.

SaaS tenants with custom primary/accent colors from setup now drive button accents at runtime via /saas/tenant/me or meta tags.

Who is affected: OVH private server on deploy. SaaS when Mike applies the platform version in releases.html.
changeLog: Fix theme selector flicker: localStorage-first read, seed from server only on login.
Stop full app render on theme change; sync select values via hp-theme-change.
Unified --hp-btn-accent tokens derived from theme --orange / tenant branding.
Remove conflicting legacy orange-gradient tab/button overrides.
Wire SaaS tenant primaryColor into buttons on PipeSync and PipeShare boot.
Cache bust dbg125 on PipeSync, mobile, portal, CSS, and addon manifest.
